title: lannea rivae
intro: Lannea rivae, also known as the African birch or wild birch, is a plant species belonging to the Anacardiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lannea rivae include the treatment of fever, malaria, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and a wound healer. Lannea rivae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional African folk medicine to treat various ailments.
